generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current (I_M) as control input and torque (τ_M) as output"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Intermediate gear transmission component in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, transmitting torque from motor to cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Final cycloidal gearbox component in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, producing final output torque (τ_out)"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring angular position and providing real-time motor angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gear transmission to measure angular position and reduce backlash/positional uncertainty"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor measuring motor phase currents (I_M) for control and friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor measuring motor torque (τ_M) and derived gearbox torque (τ_G) through encoder feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorTorqueData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the first vertical axis structure (motor, gear transmission, cycloidal gearbox) and their rotational/torque and electrical/current interconnections"
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction components for the gear transmission"
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction model for the cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink black-box data-driven friction model (LuGre) for comprehensive friction characterization"
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current measurements (I_M) from the motor phase sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor torque (τ_M) values derived from encoder feedback and torque sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) measurements derived from encoder channels for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData, SecondaryEncoderAngleData
]

instance SimulatedFrictionLossData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs from friction models (τr_M, τr_G, τr_out) for comparison with measured values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance FrictionModelMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata tracing data sources (encoder channels, simulation models) for traceability of friction analysis results"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller and encoders to the digital shadow"
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating structural/functional models (BDDs, IBDs) of the robot axis components"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre)"
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard integrating live data and friction analysis results for decision-making"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated vs. measured data traces to detect friction losses and enable iterative model updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updated friction models improve robot motion accuracy by reducing positional errors through real-time adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionalAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance OperationalDecisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizations enable proactive adjustments to friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAdjustmentAction
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation and maintenance of SysML structural models (BDDs, IBDs) describing the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance BehavioralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implementation of friction models in MATLAB Simulink for system behavior simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehavioralModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization platform for live data (current, torque, angular velocity) and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static/kinetic/viscous friction components in the gearbox through model validation"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction losses by comparing simulated vs. measured data traces and enabling iterative model refinement"
]

instance PositionalAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reduction of up to 30% inaccuracies in robot positioning through optimized friction compensation models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Proactive adjustments to friction models during operation based on dashboard visualizations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive structural understanding of the first vertical axis components (motor, gear transmission, cycloidal gearbox)"
]

instance BehavioralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Accurate simulation of system behavior with friction effects for control optimization"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Unified visualization interface for live data streams and friction analysis results supporting decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox,
                 MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, TorqueSensor,
                 StructuralSysMLModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel,
                 LuGreFrictionModel, MeasuredCurrentData, MeasuredMotorTorqueData,
                 MeasuredAngularVelocityData, SimulatedFrictionLossData, FrictionModelMetadata,
                 MQTTProtocol, SysMLTool, MATLABSimulink, CustomDashboard
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency)** with:
  - **Data Acquisition Frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) is streamed at **high frequency** (implied by live measurements and MQTT protocol).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are dynamically updated during operation to reflect **operational changes** (e.g., wear, load variations).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are aligned temporally to ensure **coherent analysis** of friction effects over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A **concrete realization** of the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) incorporating:
    - **Purpose**: Friction analysis for motion accuracy improvement.
    - **Asset**: First axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot.
    - **Processing Components**: Simulation models (e.g., **Simulation M**, **Simulation GW**, **Simulation GB**) linked to data traces via **traceability associations**.
    - **Data Traces**: Measured and simulated data (e.g., **I_M**, **r_M**, **ˆr_M**) with metadata for origin and computation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the **operational phase** of the physical system, focusing on:
  - **As Operated**: Real-time monitoring and friction modeling during robot operation to improve motion accuracy.
  - **Representation Phase**: The digital shadow provides a **live, multi-physics-aware** representation of the first axis, enabling continuous adaptation of friction models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: Comparison of simulated friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) with live measurements to validate accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Traceability of data sources (e.g., encoder channels) allows root-cause analysis of deviations.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Dynamic exchange of friction models via **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)** and **SysML** ensures conformance to operational requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for real-time sensor data streaming from the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D).
  - **Network Architecture**: Data traces are linked to simulation models via **concrete digital shadow UML class diagrams** (e.g., Fig. 5) for traceability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: Standardized concepts (e.g., **Purpose**, **DataTrace**, **Model**) from [15].
  - **SysML**: Standard modeling language for structural/functional descriptions.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Standardized framework for integrating robot data (implied by friction model integration)."
]
